description: Master each marketplace algorithm to maximize visibility

items.name: MercadoLibre ranking
items.tactic: Titulo SEO + keywords + price competitive + seller_stats (feedback >95%). Top 3 listings = 60% clicks.

items.name: Amazon A9 algorithm
items.tactic: Title relevance + reviews (4.5+ stars) + conversion_rate + sales_velocity. Review quality = visibility.

items.name: eBay Best Match
items.tactic: DSR >4.5 + shipping_cost_low + category_relevance + price_competitive. Sniping kills ranking.

items.name: TikTok Shop algorithm
items.tactic: Video recency (1-7 days) + engagement (saves/shares > likes) + completion_rate. New = boost.

items.name: Algorithm A/B testing
items.tactic: Test title, price, images. Track ranking + CTR. Roll out winners.
